title: saturation energy-ordering geometry stress map
primary_metric: minimum worst-geometry held-out saturated event energy-proxy res68, run-bootstrap 95% CIs per geometry
finding: Raw ROOT reproduction passed exactly at 640,737 selected B-stave pulses. The geometry-stress winner is gradient_boosted_trees with worst-geometry saturated energy-proxy res68 0.03272; its nominal center-4cm res68 is 0.01828 [0.017168, 0.020764]. The strong traditional rising-edge template has res68 0.08155, observed charge has 0.02049, so traditional template correction worsens the nominal saturated geometry proxy. Accepted nominal current/depth/stave bands at margin 0.020: 22. Maximum winner depth-order violation rate is 0.000; maximum absolute winner saturated-minus-unsaturated log-charge delta is 0.217. Traditional-worsening geometries: ['center_4cm', 'center_2cm', 'zero_4cm']. The result is an odd-readout closure and range-order proxy; it does not establish absolute deposited-energy truth.

next_tickets.title: S14m: external A-stack geometry validation of S14f saturation stress bands
next_tickets.body: Use event-matched A-stack charge where topology supports it to test whether S14f geometry-stable saturated B-stack correction bands transfer to an external detector handle. Expected information gain: separates duplicate-readout closure from detector-independent range-energy support before any production saturation correction.
